title: Proof Audit Cross-Critique Output
description: Strict structured output for Phase 2c cross-critique. One critiquing side reviews findings from the other side and decides per-finding whether to uphold, refute, partially uphold, or replace. OpenAI strict-mode: all properties listed in 'required'.

critiquing_side.description: Which side is doing the critique.

critiqued_side.description: Which side's findings are being reviewed.

original_gap_type.description: The gap_type the other side assigned. Use 'none' if the other side declared verified.

verdict.description: uphold = original finding is correct; refute = false positive, no real gap; partial-uphold = real concern but severity/scope wrong; uphold-but-recategorize = real gap but wrong gap_type.

reasoning.description: 1-3 sentence justification. For refute, include a concrete reason why the other side is wrong (counter-example, missed assumption already in the paper, misread of the claim).

alternative_gap_type.description: When verdict in {partial-uphold, uphold-but-recategorize}, propose a better gap_type from the gap.schema enum. Empty string '' otherwise.

alternative_severity.description: Replacement severity 1-5, or 0 if not proposing a change.

alternative_description.description: Replacement gap_description when partial-uphold or uphold-but-recategorize. Empty '' otherwise.
